entry.title: Drifting Away
entry.summary:
Author: Spacers24

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,814Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 409

Summary: Eddie saw the patient lying on the street, blood all around them. There's a few produce lying around and some broken beer can, looks like the patient was just done with grocery shopping when they got hit. It's only when he gets closer that he recognizes who the patient is.    His blood turns cold as he sees a broken and bloodied Buck lying on the ground.    “BUCK!!”  ===========Caught in an accident on his day off, Buck slips into a deep coma. The 118 is left reeling as Buck's life hangs in the balance, can they pull themselves together and will Buck ever wake up?

entry.title: Learning To Stay
entry.summary:
Author: FandomWork101

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,335Chapters: 42/?Kudos: 488

Summary: Buck knows the 118 is his family. They have been with him through so much. But when everyone goes home, it is Buck left by himself. Buck decides he wants to change that. He decides that he wants to create his own family. One that doesn’t leave. One that stays. So Buck adopts a dog. But that leads to some jealousy from the Diaz family as they feel this dog is taking all of Buck’s time.

entry.title: 365 days of you and me
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,376Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Buck thinks love is supposed to be loud—grand gestures, dramatic moments, fireworks you can’t ignore. Eddie knows better. Love is making coffee the way someone likes it. Picking up groceries without being asked. Falling asleep on the couch with your feet tangled together. Over the course of one year, Buck learns that the best kind of love doesn’t arrive all at once. It builds quietly, day by day, until one morning he wakes up and realizes Eddie Diaz is home.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: his young buck
entry.summary:
Author: beetlesandstars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,799Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 123

Summary: “Do you want to?” Terrified brown meets pleading blue. The look in his eye is answer enough. “Buck.” “I want to.” Buck tugs gently at Eddie’s happy trail. “I— I want you.” “Jesus.” “Do you want me, Eddie?” Buck murmurs. He tips the angle of his head down, looking up at Eddie through flaxen lashes. “Do you wanna fuck me?” Wordlessly, Eddie sways forward, stomach tense against Buck’s hand, lips grazing Buck’s. Buck’s never felt like this before, this— powerful. A few words out of his mouth got Eddie like this, got him this twisted up. He got hard from kissing him. “Tell me to stop,” Eddie pleads, breath hot against Buck’s mouth. “Buck.” “Can’t,” Buck exhales, fingers dipping just past Eddie’s waistband, holding him there. “Please, Eddie. Want you.”OR: 25-year-old Probie Evan Buckley isn’t expecting to meet and fawn over seasoned firefighter Eddie Diaz at the Firefighter games. He also isn’t expecting to end up in his bed.

entry.title: Can You Feel My Heart?
entry.summary:
Author: chucks_prophet

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,229Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: Does Eddie want. He wants so much he can feel it calcify his bones and clog his arteries. Wants so much his heart beats to the steady rhythm of Buck, Buck, Buck.So he drops to his knees right there in the dirty parking lot, not even caring if anyone sees as he starts working at his best friend’s zipper—scratch that, he cares if people see; he wants people to know who Evan Buckley belongs to at the end of the day.

entry.title: Comeuppance
entry.summary:
Author: Buddipher Fluff (Dinks)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,428Chapters: 3/8Kudos: 127

Summary: Come·up·pancenoun: A punishment or fate that someone deserves: A deserved rebuke or penalty I hate the Diaz parents so much. I want them (especially Helena) to hurt! I I want them to get their due. I believe neither the Buckley nor Diaz parents deserve any sort of redemption arc. And if they are given one, it should be after a LOT of genuine groveling. I want to luxuriate in paragraph after paragraph of their pain. I need whole chapters…or even better an entire story…where they drown in isolation, discomfort, and the repercussions of their abuse and treatment of Eddie and Chris. This is that. Enjoy their Comeuppance.

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,925Chapters: 8/365Kudos: 29

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

entry.title: Man What A Year
entry.summary:
Author: Fandomhoarder_666

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,640Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: Part of the KnockBuckup2026 collection, day 3 cryptic pregnancy.Takes place during the bombing and tsunami arc with some deviation from canon of course. Eddie joins a little sooner than planned, but that's okay too.Boy meets boy. Boy loves boy. Boy gets blown up and moves in with boy. Boy ends up in a tsunami with boys son and somehow has other boys baby without knowing he was pregnant. Buck is the boy and Eddie is the other boy and oh man did they have a hell of a first year together.

entry.title: this could be us
entry.summary:
Author: polybenzylene

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,758Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 30

Summary: Buck really didn’t know what he did in a past life to deserve this. His eyes snapped open again, dragged toward the front door. The house sat in heavy silence, the kind that wasn’t peaceful but rather blaringly obvious, pressing in on his ears until he swore he could hear things that weren’t there. The faint crunch of the ice-machine. Pipes settling somewhere in the walls. Some sounds, however, were missing from the regular traffic. Notably, the hum of Eddie’s fan. Where the fuck was Eddie? - or; 5 times Buck observes Eddie's sexcapades, and 1 time he does more than observe.

entry.title: New Mexico, New Man
entry.summary:
Author: MaskedmenMaruaders

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,142Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 63

Summary: "Buck?" He asked, quietly. The man didn't even glance at him. It pissed him off. Buck disappeared for a whole year, then had the audacity to act like he didn't know him? He approached the counter, taking one of the available seats. Up close it was obvious, Buck was right in front of him. The blonde approached him, not a hint of recognition in his eyes as he smiled. He had a name tag on his uniform, Derek. "What can I do for ya?" That accent sounded wrong on Buck, it wasn't being used to tease Eddie. It seemed so natural Eddie wanted to gag. OR What if New Mexico had played out differently?

entry.title: enemies
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,699Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: To their subordinates, they were sworn enemies. To the city, they were two titans vying for control. But the bruises they left on each other always served as a prelude to something much more feral. “You just don’t learn, do you, blondie?” Eddie growled, his breath hot against Buck’s ear. His free hand yanked Buck’s designer jeans and black boxer briefs down in one ruthless motion, the fabric catching at his knees. Despite his aching ribs, Buck squirmed, a futile show of resistance that only served to ground his bare ass against the hard ridge of Eddie’s erection, straining against his slacks. “Fuck you, Diaz,” he spat. . . . In which, Mob!Buddie duked it out.

entry.title: Was it really that Obvious?
entry.summary:
Author: Lualia_moon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,460Chapters: 6/9Kudos: 85

Summary: After hooking up with Tommy while Eddie was in Texas Tommy wont leave Buck alone. In an effort to get him to stop trying to get back together Buck says he's dating Eddie. Too bad Eddie is straight and in Texas...right?

entry.title: swear to be overdramatic and true
entry.summary:
Author: buckmeetsboy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,488Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 170

Summary: “I have loved you,” Buck said, “across fires, floods, earthquakes, mistaken identities, one brief period where everyone believed I was a secret prince, and the unfortunate week when you were cursed by a jealous botanist.” Eddie’s mind snagged. “A what?” “But even if all that vanished,” Buck continued fiercely, “even if every memory burned away, I would love you still. In this life. In the next. In whatever strange world dares to separate us and call itself real.” or Eddie wakes up in a telenovela coma dream

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
